title: Sleep tracker
description: Log your sleep and spot patterns over time.

log.title: Log sleep
log.saveError: Couldn't save this entry. Try again.
log.durationRequired: Please select how long you slept.

chart.empty: Log a few nights to see this.

recent.empty: No sleep logged yet. Tap "Log last night's sleep" to start.

detail.title: Sleep entry
detail.deleteError: Couldn't delete this entry. Try again.
detail.notFound: We couldn't find that sleep entry.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this entry?
confirmDelete.message: This permanently removes the sleep log. It can't be recovered.

welcome.title: Sleep shapes everything
welcome.subtitle: Tracking sleep turns a vague feeling into data you can act on.

why.title: Why it matters
why.body: Sleep affects mood, focus, stress tolerance, and physical recovery. Even one or two hours less than your personal optimum has measurable effects on how you think and feel the next day.

whatToLog.title: What to log
whatToLog.durationBody: Estimate to the nearest half-hour - precision is less important than consistency.
whatToLog.qualityBody: 1 is very poor, 5 is excellent. Your own sense of rest matters more than the number of hours.
whatToLog.notesBody: Optional - caffeine, alcohol, stress, late screens, anything that might explain the pattern.
